transcription.text: I'm walking down this road of mine, this road that I call home So am I wrong, for thinking that we could be something for real? No, am I wrong, for trying to reach the things that I can't see? But that's just how I feel That's just how I feel That's just how I feel Trying to reach the things that I can't see
